style_effects: Subtle steam curls rise from Blastois's armored joints, reflecting distorted cityscapes in its polished surface. Glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically along its shell seams, casting sharp blue-white light that illuminates metallic dust particles swirling in slow motion. The aura is a crisp, intense cobalt blue, forming a tight, geometric halo around its body. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
